ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign creator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Short description or blurb of the campaign */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal for the campaign */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Amount pledged to the campaign */,
  "percent_funded" REAL /* Percentage of the funding goal achieved */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., successful, failed, live) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the campaign */,
  "average_donation" REAL /* Average donation amount for the campaign */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the campaign is based */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used for the campaign */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was launched */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Timestamp for the campaign deadline */,
  "date_created_conversion" TEXT /* Converted timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "date_ended_conversion" TEXT /* Converted timestamp when the campaign ended */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the campaign is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the campaign is a spotlight */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the campaign belongs to */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the campaign belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video describing the campaign */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image or cover photo of the campaign */,
  "reward_tiers" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT field to store reward tiers and their details */,
  "faq" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT field to store frequently asked questions and answers */,
  "status_updates" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT field to store status updates in a structured format */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT field to store links to the campaign's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the creator */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the creator's profile picture */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the creator is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the creator's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT field to store links to the creator's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the creator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the creator account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used in the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag image */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, CAD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar, Canadian Dollar) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €, £) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "backer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the backer is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer account was last updated */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT field to store links to the backer's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_backers" (
  "campaign_backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-backer relationship */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer */,
  "pledged_amount" REAL /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "pledged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pledge was made */,
  "reward_tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward tier the backer selected */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward delivery (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_backers_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_backers_reward_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_tier_id") REFERENCES reward_tiers ("reward_tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_backers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., text, video, image) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_updates_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the user is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_tiers" (
  "reward_tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward tier */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reward tier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward tier */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Pledge amount required for the reward tier */,
  "estimated_delivery" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the reward */,
  "limit" INTEGER /* Total limit of the reward tier */,
  "remaining" INTEGER /* Remaining number of rewards available in the tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_tiers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_tags_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
